requiredClaims: each declared resource lock; capacity locks claim one numbered slot
each command-scoped resource lease selected by its trigger pattern before that assertion attempt
acquisition.failure: If atomic mkdir fails or metadata/live state conflicts, stop LOCKED; never wait, steal, or infer stale from age.
acquisition.release: Only the recorded owner removes its empty claim after merge-safe cleanup or an evidence-backed no-write abort. Recovery verifies PID/open files, worktree, branch, GitHub, and owner task before stale-claim removal.
acquisition.fallback: If atomic local claims are unavailable or editors are on different hosts, maximum concurrent editors becomes one.

commandScopedLeasing.authority: root scheduler through the standard evidence wrapper
commandScopedLeasing.claim: Before every matching assertion attempt, atomically claim one simulator-device capacity slot and record package ID, assertion ID, attempt ID, owner task ID, PID, command digest, start time, and heartbeat.
commandScopedLeasing.reentrant: If the same package owner already holds simulator-device as a declared long-lived lock, the assertion attempt reuses that claim and records the parent claim instead of acquiring a second slot.
commandScopedLeasing.failure: A missing lease or collision fails the assertion LOCKED before command execution; no wait, steal, or unleased fallback is permitted.
commandScopedLeasing.release: Release the attempt lease in a finally path after artifact and manifest finalization; preserve failure evidence and never release another owner or parent long-lived claim.

contract-inventory.reason: Canonical operation evidence and the current monolithic endpoint surface must not be changed by concurrent writers.

composition-root.reason: One integration owner for session/navigation/loop composition.

xcode-project.reason: Project and capability changes are serialized.

backend-repo.reason: One backend writer/worktree per coordinated contract.

persistence-schema.reason: Migration and durable-envelope changes require one owner.

ci-workflows.reason: Required-check semantics change under one focused owner.

simulator-device.reason: Validation resource only; never grants source ownership.
